text: Last class the final draft was approved and the agreement was ready to sign.
The partner said the price was final, and Daniel told me the deal would close on Friday.

I spoke to the client this morning. She said she was happy with the terms, and she told me she would attend the closing in person.
Good. I also called the other side. The partner said the price was final, and he told me the board would ratify the deal today.
Perfect. So the price is finalized. Daniel told me the effective date was the first of next month, so completion takes place then.
Right. At the signing, two witnesses are present, and each party countersigns the last page. The partner said the lawyers would bring the originals.
Understood. And after the closing, the proceeds are transferred the same day. The client told me the bank was ready.
Excellent work. The partner said this was the smoothest deal of the year. We close on Friday, Simone.
The effective date is the first of next month.
Each party countersigns the last page.
After the closing, the proceeds are transferred.

Hi Simone, this is Daniel from the legal team, with an update before the closing on Friday. The partner told me that the price was final and that the deal would close this week. He said the agreement was ready and that both teams would sign it on Friday. Earlier today the client said she was happy with the terms and that she would attend the signing in person. Daniel said the effective date was the first of next month, so the contract would start then. He also told me that two witnesses would be present and that each party would countersign the last page. After the signing, the closing is complete, and the proceeds are transferred the same day. The partner said this was the smoothest deal of the year. Talk soon, and well done.

First, Daniel said the agreement was ready and that the price was final. Next, the client said she would attend the signing in person. Then, on Friday, both teams sign and two witnesses countersign the last page. After that, the closing is complete and the effective date starts the deal. Finally, the proceeds are transferred the same day, and Daniel said it was the smoothest deal of the year.
